description_te: SC/ST వ్యక్తులకు సాగు కోసం భూమి కొనుగోలుకు ₹10 లక్షల వరకు ఆర్థిక సహాయం. Land purchase scheme.
description_en: Up to ₹10 lakhs financial assistance for SC/ST individuals to purchase agricultural land.

eligibility_criteria.land: Must not own more than 1 acre of land

benefit_amount: Up to ₹10,00,000 (subsidy component + loan component through banks)
application_process_te:
1. సచివాలయంలో SC/ST Welfare Assistant దగ్గర apply
2. Land identification
3. District collector approval
4. Bank loan + government subsidy
5. Land registration in beneficiary name
